parameters.jsCode:
const testCases = [
  // === WIRE ANTENNAS ===
  { name: "half_wave_dipole_300MHz", type: "solve", params: { antenna_type: "half_wave_dipole", frequency: 300e6, parameters: { length_m: 0.5 } }, expected: { z_re: [60, 85], z_im: [-50, 50], gain_dbi: [1.5, 2.8] } },
  { name: "half_wave_dipole_2.4GHz", type: "solve", params: { antenna_type: "half_wave_dipole", frequency: 2.4e9, parameters: { length_m: 0.0625 } }, expected: { z_re: [60, 85], z_im: [-50, 50], gain_dbi: [1.5, 2.8] } },
  { name: "half_wave_dipole_5.8GHz", type: "solve", params: { antenna_type: "half_wave_dipole", frequency: 5.8e9, parameters: { length_m: 0.0259 } }, expected: { z_re: [60, 85], z_im: [-50, 50], gain_dbi: [1.5, 2.8] } },
  { name: "short_dipole_300MHz", type: "solve", params: { antenna_type: "half_wave_dipole", frequency: 300e6, parameters: { length_m: 0.1 } }, expected: { z_re: [1, 20], z_im: [-2000, -100], gain_dbi: [0.5, 2.0] } },
  { name: "full_wave_dipole_300MHz", type: "solve", params: { antenna_type: "half_wave_dipole", frequency: 300e6, parameters: { length_m: 1.0 } }, expected: { z_re: [500, 5000], z_im: [-1000, 1000], gain_dbi: [2.0, 4.0] } },
  { name: "monopole_900MHz", type: "solve", params: { antenna_type: "monopole", frequency: 900e6, parameters: { length_m: 0.083 } }, expected: { z_re: [30, 45], z_im: [-30, 30], gain_dbi: [4.0, 6.0] } },
  { name: "monopole_433MHz", type: "solve", params: { antenna_type: "monopole", frequency: 433e6, parameters: { length_m: 0.173 } }, expected: { z_re: [30, 45], z_im: [-30, 30], gain_dbi: [4.0, 6.0] } },
  { name: "monopole_1575MHz_gps", type: "solve", params: { antenna_type: "monopole", frequency: 1575.42e6, parameters: { length_m: 0.0476 } }, expected: { z_re: [30, 45], z_im: [-30, 30], gain_dbi: [4.0, 6.0] } },
  { name: "yagi_3el_144MHz", type: "solve", params: { antenna_type: "yagi", frequency: 144e6, parameters: { num_elements: 3, boom_length_m: 0.75 } }, expected: { z_re: [15, 50], z_im: [-30, 30], gain_dbi: [6.0, 9.0] } },
  { name: "yagi_5el_432MHz", type: "solve", params: { antenna_type: "yagi", frequency: 432e6, parameters: { num_elements: 5, boom_length_m: 1.2 } }, expected: { z_re: [15, 50], z_im: [-30, 30], gain_dbi: [9.0, 13.0] } },
  { name: "yagi_7el_1296MHz", type: "solve", params: { antenna_type: "yagi", frequency: 1296e6, parameters: { num_elements: 7, boom_length_m: 1.5 } }, expected: { z_re: [15, 50], z_im: [-30, 30], gain_dbi: [11.0, 16.0] } },
  // === PATCH ANTENNAS ===
  { name: "patch_2.4GHz_fr4", type: "solve", params: { antenna_type: "rectangular_patch", frequency: 2.4e9, parameters: { width_m: 0.038, epsilon_r: 4.4, substrate_h_m: 0.0016 } }, expected: { z_re: [100, 400], z_im: [-100, 100], gain_dbi: [5.0, 9.0] } },
  { name: "patch_5.8GHz_fr4", type: "solve", params: { antenna_type: "rectangular_patch", frequency: 5.8e9, parameters: { width_m: 0.0158, epsilon_r: 4.4, substrate_h_m: 0.0008 } }, expected: { z_re: [100, 400], z_im: [-100, 100], gain_dbi: [5.0, 9.0] } },
  { name: "patch_915MHz_rogers", type: "solve", params: { antenna_type: "rectangular_patch", frequency: 915e6, parameters: { width_m: 0.103, epsilon_r: 3.55, substrate_h_m: 0.00152 } }, expected: { z_re: [100, 400], z_im: [-100, 100], gain_dbi: [5.0, 9.0] } },
  { name: "patch_10GHz_duroid", type: "solve", params: { antenna_type: "rectangular_patch", frequency: 10e9, parameters: { width_m: 0.0119, epsilon_r: 2.2, substrate_h_m: 0.000787 } }, expected: { z_re: [100, 400], z_im: [-100, 100], gain_dbi: [6.0, 10.0] } },
  // === HELICAL ANTENNAS ===
  { name: "helix_axial_435MHz", type: "solve", params: { antenna_type: "helix", frequency: 435e6, parameters: { turns: 10, circumference_m: 0.69, spacing_m: 0.172 } }, expected: { z_re: [100, 200], z_im: [-50, 50], gain_dbi: [10.0, 15.0] } },
  { name: "helix_normal_300MHz", type: "solve", params: { antenna_type: "helix", frequency: 300e6, parameters: { turns: 3, circumference_m: 0.1, spacing_m: 0.01 } }, expected: { z_re: [10, 100], z_im: [-200, 200], gain_dbi: [0.0, 4.0] } },
  // === QFH ===
  { name: "qfh_137MHz_noaa", type: "solve", params: { antenna_type: "qfh", frequency: 137.5e6, parameters: { turns: 0.5, diameter_m: 0.35, height_m: 0.55 } }, expected: { z_re: [30, 80], z_im: [-50, 50], gain_dbi: [2.0, 6.0] } },
  // === FREQUENCY SWEEPS ===
  { name: "sweep_dipole_250_350", type: "sweep", params: { antenna_type: "half_wave_dipole", frequency: 300e6, parameters: { length_m: 0.5, freq_start: 250e6, freq_stop: 350e6, num_points: 21 } }, expected: { resonance_mhz: [280, 320], min_s11_db: [-30, -10], bw_10db_mhz: [15, 60] } },
  { name: "sweep_patch_2_3GHz", type: "sweep", params: { antenna_type: "rectangular_patch", frequency: 2.4e9, parameters: { width_m: 0.038, epsilon_r: 4.4, substrate_h_m: 0.0016, freq_start: 2.0e9, freq_stop: 3.0e9, num_points: 51 } }, expected: { resonance_mhz: [2300, 2500], min_s11_db: [-30, -10], bw_10db_mhz: [30, 150] } },
  { name: "sweep_monopole_800_1000", type: "sweep", params: { antenna_type: "monopole", frequency: 900e6, parameters: { length_m: 0.083, freq_start: 800e6, freq_stop: 1000e6, num_points: 21 } }, expected: { resonance_mhz: [860, 940], min_s11_db: [-30, -10], bw_10db_mhz: [20, 80] } },
  // === RADIATION PATTERNS ===
  { name: "pattern_dipole_300MHz", type: "pattern", params: { antenna_type: "half_wave_dipole", frequency: 300e6, parameters: { length_m: 0.5, theta_points: 181, phi_points: 73 } }, expected: { max_gain_dbi: [1.5, 2.8], null_theta_deg: [0, 5], pattern_type: "omnidirectional" } },
  { name: "pattern_yagi_5el", type: "pattern", params: { antenna_type: "yagi", frequency: 432e6, parameters: { num_elements: 5, boom_length_m: 1.2, theta_points: 181, phi_points: 73 } }, expected: { max_gain_dbi: [9.0, 13.0], fb_ratio_db: [10, 30], pattern_type: "directional" } },
  { name: "pattern_patch_2.4GHz", type: "pattern", params: { antenna_type: "rectangular_patch", frequency: 2.4e9, parameters: { width_m: 0.038, epsilon_r: 4.4, substrate_h_m: 0.0016, theta_points: 181, phi_points: 73 } }, expected: { max_gain_dbi: [5.0, 9.0], hpbw_deg: [60, 120], pattern_type: "broadside" } },
  // === MoM SPECIFIC ===
  { name: "mom_dipole_21seg", type: "mom", params: { antenna_type: "half_wave_dipole", frequency: 300e6, parameters: { length_m: 0.5, segments: 21 } }, expected: { z_re: [68, 78], z_im: [35, 50], convergence: true } },
  { name: "mom_dipole_41seg", type: "mom", params: { antenna_type: "half_wave_dipole", frequency: 300e6, parameters: { length_m: 0.5, segments: 41 } }, expected: { z_re: [70, 76], z_im: [38, 47], convergence: true } },
  { name: "mom_patch_surface", type: "mom", params: { antenna_type: "rectangular_patch", frequency: 2.4e9, parameters: { width_m: 0.038, epsilon_r: 4.4, substrate_h_m: 0.0016 } }, expected: { z_re: [100, 400], z_im: [-100, 100], convergence: true } },
  // === EDGE CASES ===
  { name: "edge_very_short_dipole", type: "solve", params: { antenna_type: "half_wave_dipole", frequency: 300e6, parameters: { length_m: 0.01 } }, expected: { z_re: [0.01, 5], z_im: [-5000, -500], gain_dbi: [-5.0, 2.0] } },
  { name: "edge_resonant_length", type: "solve", params: { antenna_type: "half_wave_dipole", frequency: 300e6, parameters: { length_m: 0.48 } }, expected: { z_re: [60, 85], z_im: [-15, 15], gain_dbi: [1.5, 2.8] } },
  { name: "edge_thick_dipole", type: "solve", params: { antenna_type: "half_wave_dipole", frequency: 300e6, parameters: { length_m: 0.5, wire_radius_m: 0.01 } }, expected: { z_re: [55, 80], z_im: [-60, 40], gain_dbi: [1.5, 2.8] } }
];

return testCases.map(tc => ({ json: tc }));

options.systemMessage: You are a CEM validation expert analyzing regression test results for an antenna simulation tool (MoM/FDTD). Known reference values: half-wave dipole Z=73+j42, monopole Z=36.5, patch gain 6-8 dBi. Be precise about what changed and why.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ title: 'Regression detected: ' + $json.failed + ' test(s) failed (' + $json.pass_rate + ' pass rate)', body: $json.report_md, labels: ['regression', 'automated'] }) }}
